description.value:
Appears as ordinary mummified cat common in Egypt but is actually a simple form of undead. Examination reveals irregularities: ligature marks showing hanged (not strangled) cat; Aklo symbols tattooed on skin; amulets bearing Black Pharaoh's name bound in wrappings. Fed mixture of blood and incense, pet awakens to basic level of existence—aware of surroundings but unable to move. Creator places pet in desired observation location (e.g., cult meeting place entrance if suspecting being followed). Can be keyed to certain individuals by including their blood in mixture. Keyed individuals can move through pet's space without issue; intruders trigger pet causing it to scream like injured child until destroyed (10 points damage) or until keyed individual enters its field of vision. Pet becomes inert if all keyed masters slain. Can be reactivated with fresh blood/incense feeding, rekeying to new masters. Many inert pets may lie buried in Egyptian tombs, true nature forgotten.

TypeUndead Guardian
Used ByAnyone
EffectObserves designated area; alerts if non-keyed individuals intrude; screams like injured child; can be keyed to specific individuals
description.keeper: Effect: Observes designated area; alerts if non-keyed individuals intrude; screams like injured child; can be keyed to specific individuals
